parameters.text: Session cleared. What's the commercial question on the table?

parameters.toolDescription: Read from Notion: fetch a page, retrieve a block, list block children, get database metadata. Use for any read-only Notion operation. Provide endpoint path after /v1/. Examples: pages/PAGE_ID, blocks/BLOCK_ID, blocks/BLOCK_ID/children, databases/DATABASE_ID.

values.name: endpoint
values.description: Notion API path after /v1/. Use unhyphenated UUIDs from prior responses or known IDs.

parameters.toolDescription: Create or query in Notion via POST: create a page, query a database, search Notion. Provide endpoint path after /v1/ and a valid Notion API JSON body. Examples: pages (create page), databases/DATABASE_ID/query, search.

values.name: endpoint
values.description: Notion API path after /v1/. Use unhyphenated UUIDs from prior responses or known IDs.

parameters.toolDescription: Update content in Notion via PATCH: update page properties, update a block, append child blocks to a parent. Provide endpoint path after /v1/ and a valid Notion API JSON body. Examples: pages/PAGE_ID (update properties or archive), blocks/BLOCK_ID (update block), blocks/BLOCK_ID/children (append children).

values.name: endpoint
values.description: Notion API path after /v1/. Use unhyphenated UUIDs from prior responses or known IDs.
